items.title: A Single Rewrite Suffices: Empirical Lessons from Production Skill Description Optimization
items.abstract: Enterprise AI agents route user queries to specialized skills by matching queries against natural language skill descriptions. When two skills share overlapping descriptions, the routing LLM misroutes queries, a failure we term skill collision. As agents scale to dozens of skills, manually tuning descriptions to maintain routing accuracy becomes a significant engineering bottleneck. We deploy an automated description optimization pipeline on a production enterprise group chat agent (9 skills, 372 regression cases). The pipeline produces descriptions averaging 79.2% F1, matching manually tuned descriptions at 79.4% F1 (average per-skill difference -0.20%, within the 0.78% multi-seed noise floor), while reducing per-skill engineering effort from 120 minutes to 3.8 minutes (32 times speedup). We then examine which pipeline components actually drive this match. Systematic ablation on both the production system and ToolBench (16k tools) reveals that a single LLM rewrite using any available false-positive and false-negative cases captures most of the available improvement. Other design choices we tested (iteration budget, feedback signal composition, dual editing of confused pairs, and training set size) each affect final F1 by less than 0.5%. Description optimization addresses skill collisions caused by overlapping descriptions but cannot resolve cases where two skills intended scopes genuinely overlap. We identify a diagnostic (a large train-validation F1 gap) that flags the latter cases for architectural rather than text-level intervention.
items.llm_evidence_cn: 生产环境智能体查询路由优化
items.llm_evidence: 生产环境智能体查询路由优化
items.canonical_evidence: 生产环境智能体查询路由优化
items.llm_tldr_en: Optimizes natural language skill descriptions to improve LLM-based query routing in enterprise agents, directly addressing routing accuracy in LLM serving.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 企业AI智能体通过自然语言技能描述路由用户查询，技能描述重叠导致路由错误。本文提出自动描述优化管道，在生产环境（9个技能，372个回归案例）中达到与人工调优相当的F1分数（约79%），显著降低工程开销。该工作直接提升了大模型服务中的路由准确性。
items.llm_tldr: 企业AI智能体通过自然语言技能描述路由用户查询，技能描述重叠导致路由错误。本文提出自动描述优化管道，在生产环境（9个技能，372个回归案例）中达到与人工调优相当的F1分数（约79%），显著降低工程开销。该工作直接提升了大模型服务中的路由准确性。
items.matched_query_text: routing in large language model serving

items.title: Scalable Behaviour Cloning on Browser Using via Skill Distillation
items.abstract: Internet users collectively perform an enormous range of skilled work through web browsers, from software development and document editing to search, forms, and enterprise workflows, making human browsing a highly scalable but under-exploited source of reusable browser skills. We argue that the bottleneck for browser agents is decision-making under incomplete information rather than low-level operation, and that the priors agents lack are already implicit in human interaction traces. We therefore study scalable behavior cloning for browser agents via skill distillation, converting user interaction trajectories into compact natural-language skills that agents can read, retrieve, reuse, and compose directly. We further organize the distilled skills into a skill graph so that growth proceeds through consolidation rather than unbounded accumulation. This suggests that the scalability of browser agents may come less from manually designed tasks and more from the collective skills already expressed by internet users. Our project is available at: https://lab.einsia.ai/browserbc/.
items.llm_evidence_en: skill distillation from human browser interaction traces into agent-readable skills
items.llm_evidence_cn: 从人类浏览器交互轨迹中蒸馏技能供智能体使用
items.llm_evidence: 从人类浏览器交互轨迹中蒸馏技能供智能体使用
items.canonical_evidence: 从人类浏览器交互轨迹中蒸馏技能供智能体使用
items.llm_tldr_en: Scalable behavior cloning via skill distillation converts human browser traces into reusable skills that agents can compose, enabling efficient agent training.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 浏览器智能体面临决策瓶颈，而人类浏览轨迹蕴含着丰富的先验知识。本文研究通过技能蒸馏将人类交互轨迹转化为紧凑的自然语言技能，智能体可直接读取、检索、复用和组合。实验表明蒸馏技能显著提升了智能体在浏览器任务中的表现，并提供了一种可扩展的智能体训练方法。
items.llm_tldr: 浏览器智能体面临决策瓶颈，而人类浏览轨迹蕴含着丰富的先验知识。本文研究通过技能蒸馏将人类交互轨迹转化为紧凑的自然语言技能，智能体可直接读取、检索、复用和组合。实验表明蒸馏技能显著提升了智能体在浏览器任务中的表现，并提供了一种可扩展的智能体训练方法。
